race.comment: ROYAL FLARE (16) resumes. He looked to have very good ability in two runs last time in, winning very well in a good maiden on debut at Ballarat before being well backed quickly up in grade in a Class 3, just missing a head. Draws the inside for Melham who will settle handy and take beating. WOLF TWENTY ONE (3) is up and running, winning well fresh before a close-up third at Bendigo last time. He should be right there. BODY OF VENUS (8) is going well, winning two on the bounce to start the campaign before a close up fourth at Mornington. She should be right there again. PERSIAN CAVIAR (9) struggled last time in tougher grade, this suits better and she can bounce back.

favourite.name: Royal Flare
favourite.silk_colours: PURPLE AND GOLD DIAMONDS, WHITE SLEEVES AND CAP
